query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `investment_opportunities` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `title` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` TEXT,
  `opportunityType` ENUM('revenue_share', 'profit_participation', 'equity_stake', 'convertible_note', 'loan') NOT NULL,
  `targetAmount` DECIMAL(15,2),
  `minimumInvestment` DECIMAL(15,2),
  `maximumInvestment` DECIMAL(15,2),
  `expectedReturn` VARCHAR(100),
  `termMonths` INT,
  `riskLevel` ENUM('low', 'medium', 'high') DEFAULT 'medium',
  `sourcePool` ENUM('network_pool_40', 'specific_venture') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'network_pool_40',
  `maxPoolAllocation` DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 25.00 COMMENT 'Max percentage of 40% pool (default 25% = 10% of total)',
  `ventureId` INT COMMENT 'If specific venture, link to entity',
  `status` ENUM('draft', 'open', 'closed', 'funded', 'cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `openDate` TIMESTAMP,
  `closeDate` TIMESTAMP,
  `firewallClause` TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Investment is limited to the 40% Network Pool. The 60% House Retained portion is completely protected and inaccessible to investors.',
  `vetoRightsClause` TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Founding House Chair retains absolute veto power over all investment decisions.',
  `buybackClause` TEXT,
  `sunsetClause` TEXT,
  `createdById` INT,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
